title: histo

messages.description: repeat the last output or input?
input integer values to be stored (from 0 to 'size - 1')
check how many times this number was received
the number of times the value was received

body: [histo] records how many times it received a positive integer (no floats allowed). An input number is sent out the left outlet and its occurrence at the right outlet. A number in the right inlet checks and outputs that number's histogram.
